pi_items.source: Confirmed in task.json description, setup_task.sh line 16 (JOB_NAME variable), export_result.sh line 11, and verifier.py. The job name is consistently used across all task components.

Task description explicitly states 'Set a Quiet Period of 60 seconds to batch rapid triggers.' Verified in verifier.py line 28 which defaults to 60. Jenkins documentation (https://www.jenkins.io/blog/2010/08/11/quiet-period-feature/) and GitHub PR #3591 confirm quietPeriod units are in seconds, not milliseconds.

Task description explicitly states 'Configure it to PREVENT concurrent builds (ensure serial execution).' Verified in verifier.py line 30 which expects false. Jenkins documentation confirms concurrentBuild is a boolean field controlling whether concurrent builds are allowed.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring a Jenkins freestyle job named 'Docs-Site-Gen'. All metadata claims are verified: the job name is Docs-Site-Gen; the expected quiet period is 60 seconds (in which value is measured in seconds per Jenkins standards); and concurrent builds should be disabled (concurrentBuild set to false). The data is synthetic, created by the task setup script which initializes the job in a misconfigured state for the agent to fix.
